section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure readings at home range from 130 to 145 or 150 over 95 to 100 in the morning and 130 to 145 or 150 over 95 to 100 in the evening.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are patient-reported home BP readings already documented in the HPI; repeating them in Findings without specifying they were independently measured in clinic blurs the distinction between subjective history and objective exam data but is unlikely to mislead clinically.
